# pfsense_packages (Data Source)

Retrieves all installed pfSense packages.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_packages" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `packages` (Attributes List) List of installed packages. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--packages))

<a id="nestedatt--packages"></a>
### Nested Schema for `packages`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Package name (e.g. 'pfSense-pkg-saml2-auth').
- `installed_version` (String) Currently installed version of the package.
- `description` (String) Package description.
